extension.name: Gestad multiplesmtp
extension.description: Civicrm extension qui permet de la creation d'un 2 ème SMTP. Ceci dans le but de différencier les envoi le courriels transactionnel et de campagne (bluck). ---------------------------------- CiviCRM extension that allows the creation of a 2nd SMTP server. This in order to differentiate the sending of transactional emails and campaign emails (bluck).

compatibility.comments: Semantic versioning. For example, compatibility with "6.1" implies compatibility with "6.2".

php_compatibility.comments: Listed versions. For example, specify both "8.1" and "8.2".

smarty_compatibility.comments: Listed versions. For example, specify both "4" and "5".

extension.comments: This is a new, undeveloped module
